   Buffers: shared hit=2
   ->  Nested Loop  (cost=0.00..40.62 rows=2450 width=0) (actual time=0.063..0.249 rows=2450 loops=1)
         Join Filter: (c1.id <> c2.id)
         Rows Removed by Join Filter: 50
         Buffers: shared hit=2
         ->  Seq Scan on public.cats c1  (cost=0.00..1.50 rows=50 width=4) (actual time=0.055..0.057 rows=50 loops=1)
               Buffers: shared hit=1
         ->  Materialize  (cost=0.00..1.75 rows=50 width=4) (actual time=0.000..0.001 rows=50 loops=50)
               Buffers: shared hit=1

                     Buffers: shared hit=1
Settings: enable_hashjoin = 'off', enable_mergejoin = 'off'
